summary: Build opens W13 — and the goal tier locked Monday: the twice-displaced W12 §10 TT ran 7-13 in 85°F at 23:23 → Tier C, sub-21:30 (Adj #164; heat-adjusted ~22:40-22:55, still >22:30 — heat-robust, not renegotiated). T pace recalibrated and HELD at 7:50-7:55, RPE ≤7 anchor (Adj #166); MHR relocked 193 off the TT peak (Adj #165). No pain anywhere through the maximal effort — the Adj #146 read requirement closed clean. Big Tuesday: incline 150 debut + Build scheme (1×5 + AMRAP @ 135), preacher 70, crunch rebuild. Wednesday's T sits 48 h post-race — honest §11.C morning check; yellow → easy. Friday = first VO2max session of the cycle (5×3 min @ 7:10-7:25). Saturday: row 80 bump; calf 355 AM-gated. Open item: two spare calendar weeks between contiguous W25 (ends 10-11) and race day 10-24 — placement decision by the W14 test (Adj #167).

days.note: Logged — 23:23 @ 7:32/mi avg, road, 85°F, fed, Vomero Plus; HR 189 avg / 193 peak (MHR relock 193, Adj #165); cadence 173; full WU incl. 4x20 s strides; no pain anywhere. TIER C LOCKED — sub-21:30 (Adj #164). T holds 7:50-7:55 (Adj #166).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 150 debut + Build scheme
days.note: Bumps: incline 145→150, 1×5 @ 150 + AMRAP @ 135 (80% TM 168) — if 150×5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 145 (Adj #148); preacher 65→70 (Adj #150); crunch +10 rebuild to 3×12 (Adj #152). Holds: DB lat 30 (Adj #149), rear-delt 135 (Adj #153), pushdown 25 (Adj #151).
T 7:50-7:55, RPE ≤7 anchor (Adj #166). 48 h post-maximal-5K — run the §11.C morning check honestly; yellow → easy 30-40 min, week's T forfeited (Adj #167).

days.session: Off — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab
VO2max 5×3 min @ I (3 min jog rec) — first of the cycle
days.note: I pace 7:10-7:25 (Adj #166) — start at the slow end, RPE 9 anchor. First I-pace work; treadmill 1% or road.

days.session: Long run 60 min Z1 AM + Hyp B PM (≥6 h gap)
days.note: Bumps: chest-supp row 75→80 (Adj #156); seated calf 345→355 gated on a clean lift-day AM Achilles read (Adj #160). Holds/rebuilds: lat 165 (Adj #155), DB lat 35 in-band (Adj #157), preacher 60 (Adj #158), pushdown 25 (Adj #159), crunch +10 to 3×10 (Adj #161), chest fly rested re-read (Adj #162).

days.session: Off / SI prehab — Tyler 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3
